sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99958" key="sunekmoxleu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεκ-μοχλεύω</orth>, <sense id="n99958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">join in forcing open</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg007.perseus-grc1:430" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">430</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
